since_last: 16% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.81%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 16% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.37% · BTC -3.00% · Gold -1.13% · Nasdaq100 -0.19%. 16% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.81%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.81%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -6.85%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -10.45%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.98% at $150.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.98% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
